input.user_prompt:
You are an expert grader. Evaluate the candidate answer against each rubric item below.

[[ ## question ## ]]
what are the quiet live plays and theaters near me?

[[ ## criteria ## ]]
Answer the current live request for quiet live plays and theaters near Arlington Heights, IL. The answer must list actual named entities of the requested subject when live evidence supports them. Each rendered entity must have a source-backed link and location/proximity evidence for nearby requests. If live provider evidence is insufficient, the answer must say so instead of rendering page chrome.

[[ ## reference_answer ## ]]

Here are quiet live plays and theaters near Arlington Heights, IL:

1. [Metropolis Performing Arts Centre](https://chicagoplays.com/theatre/metropolis-performing-arts-centre/) - Why: Find upcoming shows, buy tickets, and more at Metropolis Performing Arts Centre in Chicago.
